results.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; MEMX LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change to Adopt New Order Type
results.abstract: MEMX LLC filed a proposed rule change to adopt a new order type called a Mid-Point Peg order which will rest at the midpoint of the NBBO.

results.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Cboe Exchange, Inc.; Order Granting Approval of Proposed Rule Change Relating to Market Maker Quoting Obligations
results.abstract: The SEC is granting approval of Cboe's proposed rule change to modify market maker minimum quoting size requirements in listed options.
